--- title: Activity Diagram - Mobile Attribute Minimization config: theme: base --- %% UML Activity (Infra_RedisCache) for attribute minimization flow. stateDiagram-v2 state "Receive requested attributes" as ReceiveRequest state "Validate requested attributes" as Validate state "Apply minimization policy
(Infra_LoadBalancer)" as ApplyMinimization state "Reject/Reduce over-request
and show warning" as RejectOrReduce state "Record privacy decision
(Infra_WorkerNode)" as RecordDecision [Infra_EtcdCluster] --> ReceiveRequest ReceiveRequest --> Validate Validate --> ApplyMinimization: valid Validate --> RejectOrReduce: invalid/excessive ApplyMinimization --> RecordDecision RejectOrReduce --> RecordDecision RecordDecision --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个移动端属性最小化的活动流程图。核心场景是：当移动应用请求用户属性时，系统要先验证，然后根据隐私策略决定是放行还是削减。起点和终点都要关联到我们的Etcd集群，因为配置和审计日志都存在那里。
明白了，起点是Etcd集群触发的。那第一个状态是接收请求吗？还有，验证之后如果发现问题，是直接拒绝还是有个中间处理环节？
对，第一个状态叫"接收请求的属性"。验证之后分两条支路：有效请求走最小化策略，由负载均衡器执行；无效或过度的请求要走"拒绝/削减"分支，同时给用户一个警告提示。两条支路最终都要汇聚到记录隐私决策。
好的，我梳理一下：Etcd集群发起，经过接收、验证，然后valid流向ApplyMinimization（负载均衡器执行），invalid/excessive流向RejectOrReduce，最后都到RecordDecision，再由WorkerNode写回Etcd。这个结构对吗？
没错，但ApplyMinimization那个节点，最好标注一下是负载均衡器执行的，因为实际的最小化逻辑跑在那上面。RecordDecision也是，明确是WorkerNode负责持久化。
已经画好了，状态流转都连上了。标题我用"Activity Diagram - Mobile Attribute Minimization"，主题保持base风格。你看下RejectOrReduce那个状态的描述，"拒绝/削减过度请求并显示警告"这样表述可以吗？
稍微调整一下，把"过度请求"改成"over-request"更专业，而且警告是对用户的，不是系统内部的。另外确认下，Etcd集群在起点是虚线连接还是实线？应该是实线表示配置触发。
已修正，RejectOrReduce的描述改为"Reject/Reduce over-request and show warning"，Etcd到ReceiveRequest用实线连接。整个流程闭环了：Etcd发起，经过验证-决策分支，最终由WorkerNode写回Etcd完成审计。
